title: Smoky Swede Crisps
description: A delicious and easy-to-make side dish perfect for snacking or as a complement to your favorite meals.
instructions: Place the chopped swede on a baking sheet, drizzle with vinegar, and sprinkle with black pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until tender and slightly caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
Crisp the chips in a dry pan over medium heat until golden brown.
Serve the roasted swede topped with crispy chips.
